samples.xml_description: Design a traffic light controller with a pedestrian button and a 60 clock cycle period. Reset signal (active low). Clock signal. Pedestrian button input. Red output signal. Yellow output signal. Green output signal. idle s1_red s2_yellow s3_green State transition logic. case (state) idle: begin if (1) begin s1_red end end s1_red: begin if (cnt == 3) begin s3_green end end s2_yellow: begin if (cnt == 3) begin s1_red end end s3_green: begin if (cnt == 3) begin s2_yellow end end endcase Counting logic. if (!rst_n) begin cnt <= 10; end else if (pass_request && green) begin cnt <= 10; end else if (!green && p_green) begin cnt <= 60; end else if (!yellow && p_yellow) begin cnt <= 5; end else if (!red && p_red) begin cnt <= 10; end else begin cnt <= cnt - 1; end Output logic. if (!rst_n) begin {red, yellow, green} <= 3'b0; end else begin {red, yellow, green} <= {p_red, p_yellow, p_green}; end
